label: About
title: About Sound Section Foundry
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 89 recent saved-signal files and 70 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @MireloAI: Today, together with @kyutai_labs, we’re introducing our new Audio-to-MIDI model. It... and Anchor image material 1, plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Sound Section Foundry: A sound-section foundry: architectural section camera grammar, central laptop-glass plate slab opened into a horizontal cutaway, low graphite base, pale wall void above. Cropped white structural masks cross the chamber like illegible title silhouettes. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against long central glass cutaway chamber, oversized cropped white foreground mask strokes, and pale mint diagonal backplane.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
